tools.name: query-blueprint-summary
tools.description: Return a compact Blueprint summary with counts for graphs, functions, variables, and components.

include_names.description: Include function, variable, and component names

tools.name: query-blueprint-graph-summary
tools.description: Return compact graph summaries for a Blueprint, with optional sample node handles.

include_sample_nodes.description: Include a small sample of node handles

tools.name: query-blueprint-node
tools.description: Return detailed information for a specific Blueprint node, including object/class pin defaults.

tools.name: query-animation-asset-summary
tools.description: Return compact animation asset summaries for AnimSequence, AnimMontage, BlendSpace, and AnimBlueprint assets.

tools.name: query-level-summary
tools.description: Return a compact list of actors in the current level or world, with optional filtering.

tools.name: query-actor-detail
tools.description: Return detailed reflected information for a specific actor in the editor or PIE world.

include.description: Optional detail sections: metadata, hierarchy, tags, visibility, mobility, bounds, components, properties

tools.name: query-actor-selection
tools.description: Return the current actor selection for the resolved world, with optional transform and bounds data.

include_transform.description: Include actor transforms in selection results

include_bounds.description: Include actor bounds in selection results

tools.name: query-spatial-context
tools.description: Return spatial context for a set of actors, including bounds, aggregate bounds, pairwise distances, and optional ground hits.

items.description: Actor reference using either actor_name or actor_handle

actor_handle.description: Actor handle returned by query-level-summary or query-actor-selection

include_ground_hits.description: Include ground-hit traces below each actor

trace_distance.description: Ground trace distance in world units

tools.name: query-world-summary
tools.description: Return high-level world state, including actor counts, loaded levels, and current selection.

tools.name: query-material-summary
tools.description: Return compact material parameter summaries with optional value expansion, true parameter filtering, and optional graph overview for base materials.

asset_path.description: Material or material instance asset path

include_graph_overview.description: Include compact expression graph overview for UMaterial assets

tools.name: query-material-instance
tools.description: Return material instance parent info and explicit parameter overrides.

tools.name: query-static-mesh-summary
tools.description: Return compact static mesh summaries including bounds, material slots, LOD settings, Nanite state, and per-LOD triangle counts.

tools.name: query-environment-summary
tools.description: Summarize editor environment lighting actors including directional lights, sky lights, sky atmosphere, exponential height fog, and post process volumes.

tools.name: query-navigation-state
tools.description: Query navigation system state for the target world, including registered nav data and bounds volumes.

include_bounds.description: Include bounds for nav data and bounds volumes

tools.name: query-replication-summary
tools.description: Query Blueprint replication settings for class defaults and authored member variables.

tools.name: get-project-info
tools.description: Get project and plugin information including project name, path, and plugin version. Optionally include project settings (input mappings, collision, gameplay tags, maps).

section.description: Include settings section: 'input', 'collision', 'tags', 'maps', or 'all'. Omit for basic info only.

tools.name: query-asset
tools.description: Query assets: search by pattern/class/path, or inspect a specific asset. Use 'query' for search mode, 'asset_path' for inspect mode.

query.description: Search query (asset name pattern, supports * and ? wildcards). Triggers search mode.

class.description: Filter by asset class (e.g., Blueprint, StaticMesh, Material)

asset_path.description: Asset path to inspect (e.g., /Game/Data/DT_Items). Triggers inspect mode.

depth.description: Recursion depth for nested objects (default: 2, max: 5). For inspect mode.

include_defaults.description: Include properties with default/empty values (default: false)

row_filter.description: Filter DataTable rows by name (wildcards supported)

tools.name: query-datatable
tools.description: Query a DataTable with structured schema and row fields.

tools.name: get-asset-diff
tools.description: Get structured diff for binary Unreal assets (Blueprints, Materials, DataTables) against SCM base version. Returns JSON diff showing added/removed/modified elements. Supports Git and Perforce.

asset_path.description: Asset path (e.g., /Game/Blueprints/BP_Player) or absolute file path to the .uasset

base_revision.description: Base revision to compare against. Git: commit hash or 'HEAD' (default). Perforce: changelist number or '#have' (default).

tools.name: query-unused-assets
tools.description: Find conservative unused-asset candidates by scanning for assets with no hard or soft referencers.

path.description: Root path to scan. Defaults to /Game

limit.description: Maximum number of candidates to return

tools.name: get-class-hierarchy
tools.description: Browse class inheritance tree showing parent and child classes. Supports both C++ and Blueprint classes.

include_blueprints.description: Include Blueprint subclasses when showing children (default: true)

tools.name: find-references
tools.description: Find references to assets, Blueprint variables, or nodes. Use type='asset' to find referencers, dependencies, or both for an asset, type='property' to find variable usages within a Blueprint, or type='node' to find node/function usages. asset_path can be a directory (e.g., /Game/Blueprints) to search all Blueprints recursively.

variable_name.description: Variable name to find usages of (required for type='property')

node_class.description: Node class name to search for (e.g., K2Node_CallFunction). For type='node'

function_name.description: Function name to filter CallFunction nodes. For type='node'

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 100)

path_filter.description: Optional path prefix filter applied to returned asset results

output_path.description: Optional JSON report output path for asset reference results

tools.name: inspect-widget-blueprint
tools.description: Inspect Widget Blueprint-specific data including widget hierarchy from WidgetTree, slot information (anchors, offsets, sizes), visibility settings, named slots, property bindings, and animations. Works only with Widget Blueprints (UserWidget subclasses).

asset_path.description: Asset path to the Widget Blueprint (e.g., /Game/UI/WBP_MainMenu)

include_defaults.description: Include widget property default values (default: false)

depth_limit.description: Maximum hierarchy depth to traverse (-1 for unlimited, default: -1)

include.description: Optional output sections to include. Supported values: 'tree', 'names', 'flat_list', 'named_slots', 'bindings', 'animations', 'capabilities'

named_only.description: Only include widgets marked as Blueprint variables in flat lists and filtered tree output

resolve_slots.description: Resolve and include slot layout information (default: true)

tools.name: create-widget-blueprint
tools.description: Create a Widget Blueprint asset with an optional root panel override. Supports dry_run, compile, and save options.

asset_path.description: Full Widget Blueprint asset path, including asset name (for example '/Game/UI/WBP_MainMenu')

parent_class.description: Optional UserWidget parent class path or short class name. Defaults to UserWidget.

create_root_widget.description: Whether a default root panel should exist after creation. Defaults to true.

root_widget_class.description: Optional root panel class when create_root_widget is true. Must inherit from PanelWidget. Defaults to CanvasPanel.

root_widget_name.description: Optional explicit name for the created root widget.

save.description: Save the created Widget Blueprint after creation.

dry_run.description: Validate creation inputs without creating the asset.

tools.name: edit-widget-blueprint
tools.description: Transactional Widget Blueprint editing with batched operations for widget tree structure, default properties, and slot layout. Supports dry_run, compile, save, and rollback_on_error.

widget_class.description: Widget class path or short class name for add_widget

parent_widget.description: Parent panel widget name for add_widget or reparent_widget

make_root.description: Create the new widget as the root widget

is_variable.description: Whether the new widget should be marked as a Blueprint variable

tools.name: edit-widget-layout-batch
tools.description: Batch edit Widget Blueprint layout slot data. This is a thin layout-focused wrapper around edit-widget-blueprint.

slot.description: Slot layout descriptor. Supports anchors, offsets, position, size, alignment, auto_size, z_order, and raw slot property paths.

action.description: Optional explicit action. Defaults to set_slot_properties.

tools.name: edit-widget-animation
tools.description: Edit Widget Blueprint animation assets in batch. Supports creating empty animations, renaming, removing, and setting playback ranges.

animation_name.description: Target animation name or display label

start_time.description: Playback range start time in seconds

end_time.description: Playback range end time in seconds

display_rate_fps.description: Optional display frame rate in frames per second

tools.name: edit-widget-component
tools.description: Edit WidgetComponent settings on either a Blueprint component template or an editor/PIE actor instance. Supports batched property updates and explicit widget class assignment.

blueprint_path.description: Blueprint asset path when editing a WidgetComponent template

actor_name.description: Actor name/label when editing a placed actor instance

component_name.description: Optional WidgetComponent name. Required if multiple WidgetComponents exist.

widget_class.description: UUserWidget class path or short name for set_widget_class

compile.description: Compile policy for blueprint targets: 'never', 'if_needed', or 'always'

save.description: Save blueprint targets after successful edits

tools.name: get-logs
tools.description: Retrieve Unreal Engine output log entries for debugging. Supports filtering by category, severity level, and message content.

category.description: Filter by log category (e.g., 'LogUEBridgeMCP', 'LogTemp', or '*' for all). Supports wildcards.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return (default: 100, max: 1000)

tools.name: manage-workflow-presets
tools.description: Manage project workflow presets stored under Config/UEBridgeMCP/WorkflowPresets with list, upsert, and delete operations.

tools.name: run-workflow-preset
tools.description: Expand or execute a project workflow preset, resolving built-in resources, prompts, default arguments, and sequential tool calls.

arguments.description: Runtime arguments merged over preset default_arguments

dry_run.description: Expand prompt/resources/tool plan without executing tools

stop_on_error.description: Stop execution when a tool call fails

tools.name: query-performance-report
tools.description: Return a lightweight performance summary for the editor or PIE world, including frame timing, actor/object counts, and memory overview.

tools.name: capture-performance-snapshot
tools.description: Capture a timestamped performance snapshot under Saved/UEBridgeMCP/PerformanceSnapshots, including JSON report data and optional viewport/log artifacts.

include_viewport.description: Capture the active editor viewport as part of the snapshot

tools.name: edit-sequencer-tracks
tools.description: Edit Level Sequence bindings, playback range, camera cuts, transform/property tracks, animation sections, and simple keyframes.

world.description: World mode to resolve actor bindings

binding_name.description: Optional display name for new bindings

property_path.description: Optional property path for float/bool tracks

slot_name.description: Optional slot name for skeletal animation sections

rollback_on_error.description: Cancel the transaction on the first failure

tools.name: edit-landscape-region
tools.description: Batch edit landscape regions with simple heightmap and layer operations, including delta, flatten, smooth, fill, and erase.

actor_name.description: Target landscape actor label or name

region_min.description: Optional region min [x,y] in landscape coordinates

region_max.description: Optional region max [x,y] in landscape coordinates

layer_name.description: Landscape layer name for fill_layer / erase_layer

save.description: Save the edited world when possible

rollback_on_error.description: Cancel the transaction on the first failure

tools.name: edit-foliage-batch
tools.description: Batch edit foliage instances in the current level, including add/remove, transform updates, and foliage type mesh replacement.

new_mesh_path.description: Replacement static mesh path for replace_foliage_type_mesh

rollback_on_error.description: Cancel the transaction on the first failure

tools.name: query-worldpartition-cells
tools.description: Query visible world partition runtime cells, including bounds, streaming status, actor count, and data layer names.

include_content_bounds.description: Include content bounds in each cell summary

tools.name: create-asset
tools.description: Create a new asset by class name. Supports any UObject type including Blueprint, Material, DataTable, DataAsset, etc. Use full class names (e.g., 'Blueprint', 'Material', 'DataAsset') or Blueprint class paths.

asset_class.description: Asset class name. Examples: 'Blueprint', 'Material', 'DataTable', 'DataAsset', 'WidgetBlueprint', 'AnimBlueprint', or Blueprint class paths like '/Game/MyDataAsset.MyDataAsset_C'

parent_class.description: Parent class for Blueprints (e.g., 'Actor', 'Character'). For AnimBlueprint, specify skeleton asset path.

tools.name: add-widget
tools.description: Add a widget to a WidgetBlueprint tree.

parent_widget.description: Parent widget name. If empty, adds to root.

tools.name: add-datatable-row
tools.description: Add a new row to a DataTable.

row_data.description: Row data as JSON string with property names matching the row struct. Example: {"Name":"Value","Count":5}

fields.description: Structured row fields object. Preferred over row_data for new callers.

tools.name: query-statetree
tools.description: Query StateTree structure: states, transitions, tasks, evaluators, and parameters. Use 'include' parameter to select sections: 'states', 'transitions', 'tasks', 'evaluators', 'parameters', 'all'.

tools.name: add-statetree-state
tools.description: Add a new state to a StateTree asset. Specify the state name, type, and optionally a parent state to create hierarchical state machines.

parent_state.description: Name of the parent state (optional, creates as root state if not specified)

tools.name: add-statetree-transition
tools.description: Add a transition between states in a StateTree asset. Transitions define how the state machine moves from one state to another.

source_state.description: Name of the source state (where the transition starts)

target_state.description: Name of the target state (where the transition goes). Use 'Succeeded', 'Failed', 'Next', or a state name.

tools.name: add-statetree-task
tools.description: Add a task to a state in a StateTree asset. Tasks define the behavior executed when a state is active.

state_name.description: Name of the state to add the task to

task_class.description: Class name of the task to add (e.g., 'StateTreeTask_PlayAnimation', 'StateTreeTask_Wait')

task_name.description: Optional display name for the task instance

tools.name: edit-statetree-bindings
tools.description: Edit StateTree property bindings using explicit struct ids and property paths.

tools.name: remove-statetree-state
tools.description: Remove a state from a StateTree asset. Warning: This will also remove all child states and transitions associated with the state.

state_name.description: Name of the state to remove

tools.name: run-python-script
tools.description: Execute a Python script in Unreal Editor's Python environment. Requires PythonScriptPlugin to be enabled.

script.description: Inline Python code to execute (mutually exclusive with script_path)

script_path.description: Path to a Python script file (mutually exclusive with script)

python_paths.description: Additional directories to add to Python sys.path for module imports (array of strings)

arguments.description: Arguments to pass to the script (accessible via unreal.get_mcp_args())

tools.name: trigger-live-coding
tools.description: Trigger Live Coding compilation for C++ code changes. Use 'wait_for_completion' to query compilation status after triggering. Windows only.

wait_for_completion.description: If true, query current compilation status instead of triggering a new compile (default: false, trigger mode)

tools.name: build-and-relaunch
tools.description: Close THIS editor instance (identified by PID), trigger a full project build, and relaunch the editor. Only affects the MCP-connected editor instance, not other running editors.

build_config.description: Build configuration: Development, Debug, or Shipping (default: Development)

skip_relaunch.description: Skip relaunching the editor after build (default: false)

tools.name: pie-session
tools.description: Control PIE (Play-In-Editor) sessions. Actions: 'start', 'stop', 'pause', 'resume', 'get-state', 'wait-for' (non-blocking single check of condition, client polls).

action.description: Action: 'start', 'stop', 'pause', 'resume', 'get-state', or 'wait-for'. Note: start/stop/wait-for are non-blocking (fire-and-forget), use get-state to poll.

timeout.description: [start] Timeout in seconds to wait for PIE ready (default: 30)

tools.name: pie-input
tools.description: Simulate player input in PIE. Actions: 'key' (press/release key, supports duration hold + axis keys), 'action' (trigger input action), 'axis' (drive a named axis mapping like 'MoveForward'), 'move-to' (pathfind), 'look-at' (rotate to face target). Works in both viewport and new_window PIE modes via PlayerController::InputKey + FTSTicker re-injection.

axis_name.description: [axis] Input axis name (e.g., 'MoveForward', 'Turn'). Resolves to the first axis key bound to it, then holds it with a ticker so axis mappings are driven every frame.

value.description: [axis] Target axis value (-1.0 to 1.0). Pass 0 to release any currently held axis key.

pressed.description: [key/action] True for press, false for release (default: press then release)

duration.description: [key] Hold the key pressed for this many seconds, then auto-release (re-injects IE_Repeat + IE_Axis every tick so axis mappings like MoveForward are driven). 0 or omitted = single press+release.

amount.description: [key] For axis keys, the amount depressed (-1.0 to 1.0). Default 1.0 for normal keys.

target_actor.description: [look-at] Target actor name (alternative to target location)

tools.name: wait-for-world-condition
tools.description: Check world conditions (actor existence, property values, tags, etc.) in editor or PIE world. MVP mode is 'check' (instant evaluation). 'wait' mode is reserved for future async implementation.

mode.description: Evaluation mode: 'check' (instant) or 'wait' (blocking, not yet implemented)

conditions.description: Array of nested condition descriptors evaluated together; all conditions must be satisfied.

items.description: Single condition descriptor. Fields required vary by type.

actor_name.description: Primary actor name for actor/property/tag/component conditions

property_path.description: Reflected property path for property comparison conditions

operator.description: Optional comparison operator hint for future expansion

expected_value.description: Expected value for property comparison conditions. Accepts any JSON value type.

target_actor.description: Secondary actor name for distance checks

substring.description: Substring to search for in log_contains conditions

tag_filter.description: Actor tag name for tag_present conditions

tools.name: assert-world-state
tools.description: Evaluate structured world assertions in editor or PIE and return machine-readable pass/fail results. Single-shot evaluation (internally forces 'check' mode). Use 'wait-for-world-condition' directly for future async waiting.

conditions.description: Array of nested condition descriptors evaluated together; all conditions must be satisfied.

items.description: Single condition descriptor. Fields required vary by type.

actor_name.description: Primary actor name for actor/property/tag/component conditions

property_path.description: Reflected property path for property comparison conditions

operator.description: Optional comparison operator hint for future expansion

expected_value.description: Expected value for property comparison conditions. Accepts any JSON value type.

target_actor.description: Secondary actor name for distance checks

substring.description: Substring to search for in log_contains conditions

tag_filter.description: Actor tag name for tag_present conditions

tools.name: call-function
tools.description: Call functions on actors, components, or global Blueprint libraries. Target format: 'ActorName.FunctionName', 'ActorName.ComponentName.FunctionName', or '/Game/BP_Lib.FunctionName'. Use 'world' param: 'editor' (default) or 'pie'.

tools.name: edit-blueprint-graph
tools.description: Transactional Blueprint graph editing with batched operations, alias support, dry-run validation, and optional compile/save.

alias.description: Alias for add_node and later references

rollback_on_error.description: Cancel the transaction on first error

tools.name: edit-blueprint-members
tools.description: Edit Blueprint members: create/rename/delete variables, functions, and event dispatchers. Accepts a batched 'actions' array. Supports compile, save, dry_run, and rollback_on_error options.

actions.description: Array of Blueprint member edit actions. Uses nested descriptors for types, inputs, outputs, and metadata.

new_name.description: New member name for rename actions

type.description: Type descriptor used for variables and function pins

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

map_key_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map key/value (one level deep)

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

map_value_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map key/value (one level deep)

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

map_key_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map key/value (one level deep)

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

blueprint_read_only.description: Mark variable as Blueprint read only

replicated_using.description: RepNotify function name when replication is repnotify

call_in_editor.description: Whether the function is callable in editor

type.description: Type descriptor used for variables and function pins

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

map_key_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map key/value (one level deep)

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

map_value_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map key/value (one level deep)

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

map_key_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map key/value (one level deep)

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

pass_by_reference.description: Whether the pin is passed by reference

type.description: Type descriptor used for variables and function pins

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

map_key_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map key/value (one level deep)

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

map_value_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map key/value (one level deep)

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

map_key_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map key/value (one level deep)

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

pass_by_reference.description: Whether the pin is passed by reference

metadata.description: Optional metadata map applied to the member definition

dry_run.description: Validate only, do not apply changes

rollback_on_error.description: Roll back entire batch on first failure (default true)

tools.name: edit-blueprint-components
tools.description: Edit Blueprint component tree (SCS): add, remove, rename, attach, set defaults, and set root component. Accepts a batched 'actions' array. Supports compile, save, dry_run, and rollback_on_error options.

actions.description: Array of Blueprint component tree edit actions with nested transform and property descriptors.

transform.description: Relative transform descriptor for SceneComponent defaults

make_root.description: Whether the new component should become root during add_component

clear_overrides.description: Whether overridden component defaults should be cleared before applying properties

tools.name: edit-datatable-batch
tools.description: Batch edit a DataTable with structured row operations such as upsert, set_fields, delete, rename, and bulk import.

tools.name: edit-level-batch
tools.description: Transactional level batch editing for actors, folders, hierarchy, visibility, mobility, and spatial authoring. Accepts 'operations[]' as the public batch envelope and continues to accept legacy 'actions[]'.

operations.description: Primary batch envelope for level operations

actor_handle.description: Actor handle returned by query-level-summary or query-actor-selection

actor_label.description: Actor label for spawn_actor or set_label

parent_actor.description: Parent actor name for attach_actor or reparent

parent_actor_handle.description: Parent actor handle for attach_actor or reparent

transform.description: Transform descriptor with location, rotation, and scale arrays

select_after_spawn.description: Select the actor after spawn in the editor world

keep_world_transform.description: Keep world transform when attaching, detaching, or reparenting (default true)

component_name.description: Component name for add_component or remove_component

actor_handle.description: Actor handle returned by query-level-summary or query-actor-selection

actor_label.description: Actor label for spawn_actor or set_label

parent_actor.description: Parent actor name for attach_actor or reparent

parent_actor_handle.description: Parent actor handle for attach_actor or reparent

transform.description: Transform descriptor with location, rotation, and scale arrays

select_after_spawn.description: Select the actor after spawn in the editor world

keep_world_transform.description: Keep world transform when attaching, detaching, or reparenting (default true)

component_name.description: Component name for add_component or remove_component

save.description: Save the current editor level after edits. Ignored for PIE worlds.

tools.name: align-actors-batch
tools.description: Align or distribute actors using world-space actor bounds. Supports center/min/max alignment and center distribution.

items.description: Actor reference using either actor_name or actor_handle

actor_handle.description: Actor handle returned by query-level-summary or query-actor-selection

save.description: Save the current editor level after edits. Ignored for PIE worlds.

tools.name: drop-actors-to-surface
tools.description: Trace downward from each actor and move it so the actor bounds rest on the first hit surface, with optional normal alignment.

items.description: Actor reference using either actor_name or actor_handle

actor_handle.description: Actor handle returned by query-level-summary or query-actor-selection

trace_distance.description: Ground trace distance in world units

offset.description: Additional offset above the hit surface

align_to_normal.description: Align the actor up-vector to the hit normal without changing yaw intent

save.description: Save the current editor level after edits. Ignored for PIE worlds.

tools.name: edit-static-mesh-settings
tools.description: Transactional static mesh settings editing for LOD group, LOD screen sizes, and Nanite enablement.

tools.name: replace-static-mesh
tools.description: Replace static mesh component instances on selected actors without changing asset defaults.

component_name.description: Optional static mesh component name filter

actors.description: Actors whose static mesh components should be replaced

items.description: Actor reference using actor_name or actor_handle

save.description: Save the current editor world after edits

tools.name: edit-material-instance-batch
tools.description: Batch material instance editing (alias of 'edit-material-instance' exposed with batch metadata). Supports dry-run and save.

actions.description: Array of edit actions. Supported: set_scalar (parameter, value), set_vector (parameter, value[4]), set_texture (parameter, texture_path), clear_override (parameter), set_parent (parent_path).

tools.name: create-material-instance
tools.description: Create a Material Instance Constant from a parent material, with optional initial parameter actions that reuse edit-material-instance semantics.

parent_material_path.description: Parent material or material instance asset path

initial_actions.description: Optional initial parameter actions using edit-material-instance action schema

save.description: Save the new material instance asset

tools.name: edit-material-graph
tools.description: Transactional material graph editing for UMaterial assets. Supports expression creation, removal, property edits, connection updates, layout, compile control, and dry-run validation.

alias.description: Transient alias for add_expression within this request

from_output.description: Source output name or output index string

material_property.description: Material property name like BaseColor or EmissiveColor

tools.name: edit-environment-lighting
tools.description: Transactional environment lighting editing for core editor lighting actors without auto-creating missing actors.

save.description: Save the current editor level after edits

tools.name: create-animation-montage
tools.description: Create an animation montage from one or more AnimSequence assets using the default slot track.

tools.name: edit-anim-blueprint-state-machine
tools.description: Edit an existing Anim Blueprint state machine with batched structural operations such as add/remove state, transitions, entry state, and single-sequence state assignment.

compile.description: Compile the Anim Blueprint after edits

tools.name: create-input-action
tools.description: Create an Enhanced Input Action asset with common authoring defaults.

tools.name: create-input-mapping-context
tools.description: Create an Enhanced Input Mapping Context asset with optional initial key mappings.

tools.name: edit-input-mapping-context
tools.description: Edit an Enhanced Input Mapping Context with batched mapping operations.

tools.name: manage-gameplay-tags
tools.description: Manage project gameplay tags and replication-related gameplay tag settings.

tools.name: create-gameframework-blueprint-set
tools.description: Create a coordinated set of GameFramework Blueprints under a shared folder and naming prefix.

base_name.description: Shared base name used for generated assets

tools.name: create-ai-behavior-assets
tools.description: Create coordinated Blackboard and BehaviorTree assets for AI authoring.

base_name.description: Shared base name for AI assets

base_class.description: Base class path for object/class keys

instance_synced.description: Whether this key is instance synced

tools.name: edit-replication-settings
tools.description: Edit Blueprint replication settings for actor defaults and Blueprint-authored variables.

tools.name: compile-assets
tools.description: Compile one or more Blueprint assets (Blueprint, WidgetBlueprint, AnimBlueprint). Returns per-asset compile status and diagnostics. This is the recommended compile path; use run-python-script only as a legacy fallback.

asset_paths.description: One or more compileable asset paths

mode.description: Compile mode: 'auto' detects asset type, 'blueprint_only' skips non-Blueprint assets

stop_on_first_error.description: Stop batch on first compile failure

tools.name: manage-assets
tools.description: Manage assets: rename, move, duplicate, delete, save. Batched via 'actions' array.

actions.description: Array of asset lifecycle actions with nested action-specific fields.

new_name.description: New asset name for rename or duplicate

destination_path.description: Destination package path for move or duplicate

save.description: Save modified assets after actions complete

tools.name: manage-asset-folders
tools.description: Manage asset folders with batch operations for ensure, rename, move, and delete.

tools.name: import-assets
tools.description: Import external files (FBX, PNG, JPG, TGA, WAV, etc.) into the project as UE assets. Supports explicit factory selection and generic import_options mapped through reflection.

imports.description: Array of import descriptors with nested action-specific fields.

replace_existing_settings.description: Replace existing import settings when overwriting

factory_name.description: Optional factory class name or class path, e.g. 'FbxFactory' or '/Script/UnrealEd.FbxFactory'

import_options.description: Import option overrides. Keys are property paths applied to task options or factory objects, e.g. 'ImportUI.bImportMaterials'.

rollback_on_error.description: Stop batch on first failure and return partial results

tools.name: source-control-assets
tools.description: Source control operations on assets: status, checkout, revert, submit, and sync. Uses the editor's configured source control provider.

actions.description: Array of source control actions with nested action-specific fields.

asset_paths.description: Asset object paths or package file paths

keep_checked_out.description: Keep files checked out after submit

force.description: Force sync even if the file already appears current

last_synced.description: Force sync to the last synced revision

tools.name: create-user-defined-struct
tools.description: Create a UserDefinedStruct asset with authored fields.

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

object_class.description: Class path for object and soft_object kinds

class_path.description: Class path for class and soft_class kinds

map_key_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map keys

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

object_class.description: Class path for object and soft_object kinds

class_path.description: Class path for class and soft_class kinds

map_value_type.description: Nested type descriptor for map values

struct_path.description: Struct path for struct kinds, e.g. '/Script/CoreUObject.Vector'

object_class.description: Class path for object and soft_object kinds

class_path.description: Class path for class and soft_class kinds

save.description: Save the struct asset after creation

tools.name: create-user-defined-enum
tools.description: Create a UserDefinedEnum asset with authored entries.

save.description: Save the enum asset after creation

tools.name: capture-viewport
tools.description: Capture the active editor viewport to a PNG or JPG file. Returns the file path and metadata.

output_path.description: Output file path (e.g. 'D:/Temp/capture.png'). If empty, uses project Saved/Screenshots.

tools.name: apply-material
tools.description: Apply a material to an actor component or Blueprint component by slot index or slot name. Supports editor/PIE world targets, Blueprint component templates, and optional parameter overrides.

target_type.description: Target type: actor, component, or blueprint_component

actor_name.description: Actor name or label for actor/component targets

component_name.description: Mesh component name for component or blueprint_component targets

blueprint_path.description: Blueprint asset path for blueprint_component targets

material_path.description: Material or material instance asset path to apply

slot_index.description: Material slot index. Defaults to 0 when slot_name is omitted.

slot_name.description: Optional material slot name. If both slot_name and slot_index are provided, they must resolve to the same slot.

create_dynamic_instance.description: Create a dynamic material instance on actor/component targets before applying parameter overrides

parameter_overrides.description: Material parameter overrides. Numbers map to scalar params, numeric arrays to vector params, and strings to texture asset paths.

tools.name: edit-spline-actors
tools.description: Batch edit spline components on actor instances, including point creation, removal, transform, tangents, and closed-loop state.

save.description: Save the edited world when possible

rollback_on_error.description: Cancel the transaction on the first failure

tools.name: blueprint-scaffold-from-spec
tools.description: High-level Blueprint scaffolding that creates or merges a Blueprint from a spec containing components, variables, functions, and event_graph steps. Orchestrates edit-blueprint-members, edit-blueprint-components, add-graph-node, connect-graph-pins, and compile-assets internally.

parent_class.description: Parent class path (for new assets), e.g. '/Script/Engine.Actor'

overwrite_mode.description: What to do if the asset exists: 'error', 'replace', or 'merge'

spec.description: Blueprint spec with optional 'variables', 'functions', 'components', and 'event_graph' arrays.

save.description: Save the Blueprint if scaffolding succeeds

tools.name: query-gameplay-state
tools.description: Query runtime gameplay state for a PIE actor, including montage, gameplay tags, GAS attributes, abilities, and optional StateTree state. Supports section filters and returns a structured envelope with warnings and diagnostics.

actor_name.description: Actor name or label to query

include.description: Sections to include: gameplay_tags, attributes, abilities, montage, state_tree

attribute_set_filters.description: Optional wildcard or substring filters for AttributeSet class names or paths

gameplay_tag_filters.description: Optional wildcard or substring filters applied to returned gameplay tags

tools.name: auto-fix-blueprint-compile-errors
tools.description: Attempt to automatically fix Blueprint compile errors using deterministic strategies: refresh_all_nodes, reconstruct_invalid_nodes, remove_orphan_pins, and recompile_dependencies. Conservative v1 with diagnostics, partial results, and no semantic graph rewrites.

compile_after_each_attempt.description: Compile after each attempt (default true). If false, only one effective attempt is used.

save_on_success.description: Save fixed Blueprints when compilation succeeds

tools.name: generate-level-structure
tools.description: Generate procedural level structures in the editor world using the engine Cube mesh. Supports dry-run validation, optional material overrides by generated part name, and level saving.

world.description: Target world. Only 'editor' is currently supported.

size.description: Size: {width, depth, height} in UE units

material_overrides.description: Optional material overrides keyed by generated part name. Values are material asset paths.

save.description: Save the current editor level after generation

dry_run.description: Validate the request only without spawning actors

tools.name: edit-control-rig-graph
tools.description: Edit the main Control Rig graph by adding/removing units, setting pin defaults, linking pins, and laying out nodes.

unit_struct_path.description: Rig unit struct path for add_unit

pin_name.description: Pin name when composing a target pin path from node_name/alias

value.description: Pin default value; numbers and booleans are also accepted

save.description: Save the Control Rig Blueprint asset

compile.description: Compile the Control Rig Blueprint after edits

rollback_on_error.description: Cancel the transaction on the first failure

tools.name: generate-pcg-scatter
tools.description: Create or update a PCG actor/component target, bind an existing graph or generated scaffold graph, and optionally trigger generation.

actor_name.description: Optional existing target actor name or label

create_mode.description: Target creation mode when actor_name does not resolve

label.description: Requested label when creating a new target actor

graph_asset_path.description: Optional existing PCG graph asset path

template_name.description: Optional built-in template scaffold name used when graph_asset_path is omitted

generated_graph_asset_path.description: Optional destination path for a generated scaffold graph

bounds_min.description: Optional bounds min [x,y,z] for created targets

bounds_max.description: Optional bounds max [x,y,z] for created targets

generate.description: Trigger generation after binding the graph

dry_run.description: Validate and expand the target plan only

tools.name: generate-external-content
tools.description: Generate external text or JSON content through an HTTP-based provider adapter, returning the brief, effective prompt, content payload, and structured metadata.

brief.description: Content brief describing what to generate

reference_prompt.description: Optional reference prompt or style guidance

metadata.description: Optional structured metadata passed through to the provider prompt

provider.description: Optional provider override; defaults to settings
